title: lasianthus dichotomus
intro: Lasianthus dichotomus, a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, is native to Southeast Asia and is commonly known as the dichotomous tea tree. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Lasianthus dichotomus is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
